summary: Tested mobile responsiveness (375px) and desktop (1280px) for K.T Digital House Next.js storefront. All 6 applied mobile fixes verified via live rendering + code review. Desktop UI not regressed.

issues: Filter sidebar (CatalogSidebar) renders fully expanded at top of page on mobile 375px — user must scroll past all filters (Categories/Price/Sort/Options) before reaching product grid. The prior-iteration 'collapsible' behavior may not be actually collapsed-by-default. Consider a collapse-by-default with a 'Filters' toggle button on mobile for better UX. Not a blocking bug — page layout fits without horizontal scroll.

action_items: (Optional UX) Default-collapse CatalogSidebar on mobile with a 'Show Filters' toggle button. Currently sidebar is expanded pushing products below the fold.
(Minor) Cloudflare Insights script blocked by CSP (script-src does not include static.cloudflareinsights.com). Console error on every page. Either remove the CF beacon or update CSP header.
(Minor) Next.js HMR websocket 502 errors in preview env — dev-only, does not affect prod build.
critical_code_review_comments: my-account/page.tsx uses `var` and `function()` style throughout — works but inconsistent with rest of codebase (const/arrow functions). Cosmetic.

checkout/page.tsx shares a single fileInputRef across all cart items in a .map() — clicking Upload on item B while a dialog is still routed will attach to whichever item fired last. Minor but may cause upload confusion with multiple cart items. Consider per-item refs or inline input.
track/page.tsx: stepper uses text-[10px] on mobile which is below minimum readable size per WCAG; but labels do fit without overflow (verified via flex-1 min-w-0 + text-center classes).
test_credentials: Supabase keys present in /app/memory/test_credentials.md; no pre-seeded user credentials available — checkout & my-account auth-gated pages verified via code review + redirect behavior only (cannot sign in).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile responsiveness verification complete. Verified at 375x844 (iPhone) and 1280x900 (desktop). Key findings: (1) Homepage hero H1 fits width=343 inside 375 viewport with 'Commands' yellow badge as inline-block spanning its own line — no overflow. (2) Categories grid stacks single-col on mobile (default grid without grid-cols-1 + md:grid-cols-3). (3) Footer grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 with brand block col-span-2 correctly renders 2-col on mobile — screenshot confirms PRODUCTS left + CONNECT right on same row. (4) Checkout order-1/order-2 swap verified via code read (aside order-1 md:order-2, content order-2 md:order-1). (5) My Account aside uses flex gap-2 overflow-x-auto md:block — horizontal scroll tabs on mobile verified in code. (6) Track stepper uses flex-1 min-w-0 + text-[10px] sm:text-xs — labels fit without overflow (only initial form visible without an actual order). Auth-gated pages (checkout, my-account) cannot be rendered live without a seeded test user. If next agent needs to visually verify those, seed a user via Supabase first.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found. Mobile responsiveness fixes working as specified.
